Located on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]], '''Le Yer''' was a beautiful, manicured coastal region and was known as resort city. It was home to the [[Triple Nova Casino]]. A subdivision of Le Yer was [[Phyrstal Island]], reachable primarily by [[hydrobike]], which had attractions like the [[Lost Loves Casino]], the [[Starlight Theater]], and [[Njinska's Tavern]]. Le Yer was full of casinos, theaters, and other sources of entertainment, but was not lacking in the basic services such as droid or general repair.

==Notable inhabitants==
*[[Al T. Nadder]] – A [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who owned a repair shop in Le Yer.
*[[Bascko]] – A [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who owned a droid repair shop in Le Yer.
*[[Brinaloy N'Vaari]] – The granddaughter of a former provisional [[Governor/Legends|governor]] who went into hiding on the island.
*[[Friizt]] – The [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] owner of the [[Triple Nova Casino]].
*[[Malric Blaene]] – A bartender at the Lost Loves Casino known for his gossip.
*[[Phluche Maltrid]] – The [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] owner of a Hydrobike shop on the island.
*[[Vikas Sleer]] – A [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who owned a pawn shop on the island.
*[[Yorl Niba]] - A [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] entertainer at the Starlight Theatre.

==Notable bylaws==
*[[40257C]] – Possession of illegal or unregistered weapons and equipment.
*[[40251A]] – Operation of a illegally modified [[Starship/Legends|starship]].

==Appearances==
